title: glycosmis nelliyampathiensis
intro: Glycosmis nelliyampathiensis, a rare and endangered species of plant, is a member of the Rutaceae family and is native to the Western Ghats of India. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oils, which have been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Glycosmis nelliyampathiensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its use in traditional medicine for its anti-diabetic and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which are used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to harness its therapeutic benefits.
